title: IM Messaging
subtitle: Configure third-party IM platforms to chat with AI on mobile

feishu.label: Feishu
feishu.description: Feishu is ByteDance's enterprise collaboration platform with bot support.

dingtalk.label: DingTalk
dingtalk.description: DingTalk is Alibaba's enterprise collaboration platform for internal bots.

qqbot.label: QQ
qqbot.description: QQ Bot supports QQ channels and group messaging.

wecom.label: WeCom
wecom.description: WeCom is Tencent's enterprise communication tool with app bots.

telegram.label: Telegram
telegram.description: Telegram is a popular global messaging app with Bot API support.

discord.label: Discord
discord.description: Discord is a voice and text chat platform popular in gaming communities.

pairing.title: User Pairing
pairing.description: After configuring an IM channel, users will receive a pairing code on their first message. Enter the code here to complete binding.
